definition.description: This is Resource configuration snapshots Execution Component.

operation.description: Operation to perform: fetch, store, diff. (required)

resource-id.description: Identifier for the resource config to operate on. (required)

resource-type.description: Type of the resource config to operate on, e.g. PNF, VNF, etc. (required)

resource-status.description: Status of the resource to fetch or store, either RUNNING or CANDIDATE. (optional)

resource-snapshot.description: The resource config snapshot to store for the resource identified by id/type/status. (store operation only)

diff-content-type.description: Specify the type of content expected, to perform comparison on. (diff operation only)

status.description: Status of the Component Execution ( success or failure )

description: This is Resource configuration snapshots Execution Component.

definition.description: This is Remote Ansible Playbook (AWX) Execution Component.

job-template-name.description: Primary key or name of the job template to launch new job.

workflow-job-template-id.description: Primary key (name not supported) of the workflow job template to launch new job.

limit.description: Specify host limit for job template to run.

inventory.description: Specify inventory for job template to run.

extra-vars.description: json formatted text that contains extra variables to pass on.

tags.description: Specify tagged actions in the playbook to run.

skip-tags.description: Specify tagged actions in the playbook to omit.

status.description: Status of the Component Execution ( success or failure )

description: This is Remote Ansible Playbook (AWX) Execution Component.

definition.description: This is Resource Deletion Component API

resolution-key.description: Resolution key associated with stored assignments and templates. Required if resource-type + resource-id are empty

resource-type.description: Resource-type associated with stored assignments and templates. Required if resolution-key is empty. Must be used together with resource-id

resource-id.description: Resource-id associated with stored assignments and templates. Required if resolution-key is empty. Must be used together with resource-type

artifact-prefix-names.description: Template , Resource Assignment Artifact Prefix names

fail-on-empty.description: Determines if the component should fail when nothing was deleted

description: This is Resource Deletion Component API

definition.description: This is Resource Assignment Component API

assignment-params.description: Holds resolved template, resolution-summary or key-value

assignment-map.description: Holds resolved values for each artifact prefix eg. { vdns: { vnf-id: 123 } }

resolution-key.description: Key for service instance related correlation.

occurrence.description: Number of time to perform the resolution.

store-result.description: Whether or not to store the output.

force-resolution.description: Delete existing values to force new resolution. Ineffective when occurrence < 1

artifact-prefix-names.description: Template , Resource Assignment Artifact Prefix names

request-id.description: Request Id, Unique Id for the request.

dynamic-properties.description: Dynamic Json Content or DSL Json reference.

description: This is Resource Assignment Component API
